spec_match.rationale: Accurately exercises all Set-like methods on the real document.fonts object, providing a clear demonstration of the API shape.

interactive.rationale: Extremely interactive with live font adding/clearing controls and separate run buttons for each Set-like method showing direct results.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Aligned perfectly with the Set-like API capabilities that removing LegacyNoInterfaceObject makes easier to document and type-check.

edge_cases.rationale: Handles empty states gracefully and guards against unsupported browsers during the instanceof check.

references.rationale: The parent index.html contains the ChromeStatus reference, though adding it here would be beneficial.

design_system.rationale: Consistent with the showcase design system, using proper grid layout and card styling.

openQuestions.title: Add ChromeStatus and spec links to see also
openQuestions.detail: Add direct links to the ChromeStatus entry and CSS Font Loading spec in the 'see also' section of this concept page for better reference consistency.
